case.title: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION v. MILLERS' NAT FEDERATION

opinion.h: FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION v. MILLERS' NAT FEDERATION, 274 U.S. 743 (1927)
FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION, petitioner, v. MILLERS' NATIONAL FEDERATION et al.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for a writ of certiorari to the Court of Appeals of the District of Columbia denied. [Footnote 1]

f.p: Case pending and undetermined in court below.[ Federal Trade Commission v. Millers' Nat Federation 274 U.S. 743 (1927) ]
